text.title: Gcp Llm Prompts Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns commonly observed when applying the gcp-llm-prompts methodology. Each pairs a symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Output shape varies between runs; downstream automation breaks.
antipattern.root-cause: Engineer crafts prompt inline rather than using the curated template.
antipattern.fix: Switch to curated template; submit improvements as PR to the library.

antipattern.symptom: Parsers can't extract findings reliably; manual transcription required.
antipattern.root-cause: Prompt asks for prose output instead of JSON.
antipattern.fix: Update prompt to require JSON output conforming to schema; run validator.

antipattern.symptom: Behaviour drifts silently between prompt revisions.
antipattern.fix: Pin `template_id` + `version` in consumer config; bump on intentional change.
